channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-14624] recovery-small: test_137: @@@@@@ FAIL: resend got applied
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Artem Blagodarenko <artem.blagodarenko@hpe.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/cc96a8db-f56d-4d78-8649-5acac8b61e7a

== recovery-small test 137: late resend must be skipped if already applied =========================== 04:42:21 (1618893741)
Filesystem 1K-blocks Used Available Use% Mounted on
10.9.6.197@tcp:/lustre 5447552 52992 5388416 1% /mnt/lustre
dd: failed to open '/mnt/lustre/d1/f137.recovery-small': Numerical result out of range
dd: failed to open '/mnt/lustre/d2/f137.recovery-small': Numerical result out of range
CMD: trevis-64vm8 lctl set_param fail_loc=0x80000525
fail_loc=0x80000525
ln: failed to access '/mnt/lustre/d1/f137.recovery-small': No such file or directory
chmod: cannot access '/mnt/lustre/d2/f137.recovery-small': No such file or directory
chmod: cannot access '/mnt/lustre/d2/f137.recovery-small': No such file or directory
stat: cannot stat '/mnt/lustre/d2/f137.recovery-small': No such file or directory
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/recovery-small.sh: line 2869: [: ==: unary operator expected
recovery-small test_137: @@@@@@ FAIL: resend got applied
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6273:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/recovery-small.sh:2869:test_137()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6576:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6623:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6465:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/recovery-small.sh:2871:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2021-04-19/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-1_80230_1_7_a881fe8c-9982-4b5d-bf4c-ab6898cc4a8c/recovery-small.test_137.*.1618893751.log
CMD: trevis-64vm5.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-64vm6,trevis-64vm7,trevis-64vm8,trevis-64vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2021-04-19/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-1_80230_1_7_a881fe8c-9982-4b5d-bf4c-ab6898cc4a8c/recovery-small.test_137.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1618893751.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2021-04-19/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-1_80230_1_7_a881fe8c-9982-4b5d-bf4c-ab6898cc4a8c/recovery-small.test_137.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1618893751.log
Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...CMD: trevis-64vm5.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-64vm6,trevis-64vm7,trevis-64vm8,trevis-64vm9 lctl set_param -n fail_loc=0 fail_val=0 2>/dev/null
done.
item.summary: recovery-small: test_137: @@@@@@ FAIL: resend got applied

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
